data.body:
G3 child-coverage audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child 59ef "Verified fake: contract tests run against BOTH real and fake AcliClient"), 4-bucket per parent criterion, re-cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/822a/8937/fe57). VERDICT: clean pairing — no G3 finding attributable to this child, and NO uncovered parent criterion remains across the roster.

OWNED CRITERIA — FULLY covered by this child:
- Parent SC "Producer (fetcher+enrichment) and consumers cannot drift on snapshot shape without a test failing" — the FIDELITY half (the bug-0ee6 failure mode "tests pass against fictional shapes") → 59ef AC1 (dual-run shape-contract harness over the enrichment surface get_comment_map/get_issuelinks_map/get_parent_map/search_issues; fake always-hermetic + real live-gated) + AC2 (the fake FAILS the contract if its return shape diverges from the real client's). FULLY. This complements 8937 (schema SSOT + joint round-trip) and fe57 (honest fixtures/fake foundation), which own the producer↔consumer-drift half via the snapshot contract.
- CONTRIBUTED: parent SC "new tests assert behavior/contract … zero change-detector tests added" via 59ef AC3 (assertions check structure/type — keys + JSON primitive types — not exact values); and parent SC "suite stays lean / no flake" via 59ef AC4 (live opt-in; does not flake or slow the default suite).

DELEGATION — parent criteria this child does NOT own are correctly assigned to named siblings; this child's declared OUT items (capturing fixtures → story A/fe57; snapshot round-trip → story B/8937) are consistent with the roster:
- AC "SSOT snapshot-entry schema module" + AC "test validates fetcher snapshot vs schema" + AC "test validates each differ's reads vs schema" + AC "one round-trip contract test through the production path using real-Jira fixtures" → 8937 (AC1/AC2/AC3) + fe57 (real-payload fixtures/fake).
- AC "outbound collapsed to a single production path" + AC "retired outbound applier path deleted" → 33d0 (AC1).
- AC "outbound sub-op telemetry surfaced in the structured batch outcome" + AC "computed>0 && applied==0 fails loudly (warn-first)" → 2359 (AC1/AC2/AC3).
- AC "bidirectional comment/link/parent round-trip asserted hermetically" + AC "every probe assertion encoding a current bug as expected converted to fail-when-the-gap-closes" → 822a (AC1/AC2).

ANTI-FP — the recurring "Parent AC6 (documented anti-change-detector guardrail) only PARTIALLY covered" finding from earlier audits on this ticket is a FALSE POSITIVE and is WITHDRAWN. The actual parent acceptance criterion reads verbatim: "A documented anti-change-detector guardrail for reconciler tests is committed and referenced by new tests (owned by story B)." It (a) explicitly NAMES its owner — story B = sibling 8937 — and (b) is FULLY covered there: 8937 description "Owns the epic's guardrail artifact (resolves the roster-level gap): commit a documented anti-change-detector guardrail for reconciler tests — a short docs/ note (ADR-style) … New tests reference it," and 8937 AC5 = "A documented anti-change-detector guardrail (ADR-style note recording the testing-strategy decision + the schema location + the rules) is committed and referenced by the new tests." Under the G3 ANTI-FP rule (a criterion covered-by-definition by a named consumer counts), this is FULLY covered, not partial. The earlier "AC6 PARTIALLY" finding was raised against a paraphrased "governs new tests" wording that does not match the plan text and predates 8937's explicit ownership; it is not re-filed. (The most recent G3 audits on siblings 33d0 and 2359 already withdrew the same false positive.)

4-bucket summary for this pairing: FULLY — parent SC "producer/consumers cannot drift on shape" (fidelity half OWNED by this child); CONTRIBUTED — parent SC "zero change-detector" (59ef AC3) + parent SC "suite stays lean / no flake" (59ef AC4); COVERED-BY-NAMED-SIBLING — all schema/contract/round-trip (8937+fe57), applier-collapse (33d0), telemetry/canary (2359), bidirectional round-trip/probe-de-encode (822a), and the documented guardrail (8937 AC5, explicitly named owner); STRUCTURAL/AGGREGATE — parent AC "all six child stories closed; full reconciler suite green." UNCOVERED — none. No G3 coverage finding for this pairing.
